name: Eye in the bottle
description: Glows in the dark. Whispers the name of the person who bought it. Not recommended for use in sleep.

name: Empty notebook
description: Pages flip by themselves. On the last page — your portrait. But the face is erased.

name: Key to the door that doesn't exist
description: If you turn it three times — you will hear someone calling your name... from inside the wall.

name: Clocks going backwards
description: When the hands reach 12:00 — you forget who you are. The price includes one lost memory.

name: Mirror without reflection
description: You see only yourself... but sometimes — someone else behind your back. He smiles. You — not.

name: Letter from your future self
description: On the envelope it says: «Do not open». If you open it — you have already opened it. Expiry date: until dawn.

name: Shadow in the box
description: The box is closed. But if you place your hand on the lid — it will become cold. Very cold.

name: Radio that catches dreams
description: On the frequency 444.44 MHz — the voice of your mother. On 666.66 — her laugh. Do not switch.

name: Bottle of air from childhood
description: Open it — and you are 7 years old again. But you don't remember why you were running. And why the person behind you was running too.

name: Doll that knows your surname
description: Its eyes watch you. Its mouth moves when you sleep. It doesn't speak — it *repeats*.
